scope_note: UChicago’s official required-materials page is explicit about policy rather than score bands, so this panel stays school-wide and policy-focused.
policy: UChicago is test-optional. It says SAT or ACT scores are optional and not required, applies a No Harm testing policy, and allows self-reported scores with official reports required only after admission and enrollment.

claims.claim: Submitting an SAT or ACT is optional and not required for admission.
UChicago says any submitted SAT or ACT score is used only if it helps the applicant under its No Harm testing policy.
Students may self-report scores and only enrolling admitted students must later send official reports.
